commands.title: /etc/hosts
commands.description: Register a local DNS entry for the victim.

commands.title: /etc/resolv.conf
commands.description: Register the victim as the primary DNS server.

commands.title: DNS Lookup
commands.description: Resolve records from the target DNS server.

commands.title: Zone Transfer
commands.description: Test for an exposed DNS zone transfer.

commands.title: Reverse DNS Lookup
commands.description: Check the PTR record for the victim IP.

commands.title: Basic Scan
commands.description: A simple yet effective scan to find open ports and identify services.

commands.title: All Ports Scan
commands.description: Scans all 65,535 TCP ports. Can be slow, but is very thorough.

commands.title: All Ports + Output
commands.description: Full TCP scan with normal, grepable, and XML output.

commands.title: Targeted Service Scan
commands.description: Run scripts and versions against known open ports.

commands.title: UDP Scan
commands.description: Scans for common open UDP ports.

commands.title: Aggressive Scan
commands.description: Enables OS detection, version detection, script scanning, and traceroute.

commands.title: Vuln Scripts
commands.description: Run Nmap vulnerability scripts against discovered services.

commands.title: NXC - Enumerate SMB
commands.description: Basic SMB enumeration with NetExec (nxc).

commands.title: NXC - Null Session Shares
commands.description: List SMB shares accessible with a null session.

commands.title: NXC - Authenticated Shares
commands.description: List SMB shares using provided credentials.

commands.title: NXC - Users
commands.description: Enumerate domain users with valid credentials.

commands.title: NXC - Groups
commands.description: Enumerate domain groups with valid credentials.

commands.title: NXC - Password Policy
commands.description: Read the domain password policy over SMB.

commands.title: SMBMap
commands.description: Enumerate SMB share permissions.

commands.title: Enum4linux-ng
commands.description: Run broad SMB and RPC enumeration.

commands.title: WhatWeb
commands.description: Fingerprint web technologies.

commands.title: Nikto
commands.description: Check common web server misconfigurations.

commands.title: Gobuster Dirs
commands.description: Bruteforce common web paths.

commands.title: Feroxbuster
commands.description: Recursive web content discovery.

commands.title: FFUF VHost
commands.description: Discover virtual hosts for a domain.

commands.title: HTTP Headers
commands.description: Fetch response headers only.

commands.title: Robots/Sitemap
commands.description: Quickly check common crawler files.

commands.title: Hydra SSH
commands.description: Test SSH credentials from user and password lists.

commands.title: Hydra HTTP POST
commands.description: Test a web login form.

commands.title: NXC - Password Spray
commands.description: Spray a single password against a list of users.

commands.title: Kerberoasting
commands.description: Request service tickets for users with SPNs to crack offline.

commands.title: AS-REP Roasting
commands.description: Request TGTs for users that don't require pre-authentication.

commands.title: Hashcat NTLM
commands.description: Crack NTLM hashes with Hashcat mode 1000.

commands.title: Hashcat Kerberoast
commands.description: Crack Kerberos TGS hashes with Hashcat mode 13100.

commands.title: Hashcat AS-REP
commands.description: Crack AS-REP hashes with Hashcat mode 18200.

commands.title: Netcat Listener
commands.description: Start a reverse shell listener.

commands.title: TTY Upgrade
commands.description: Upgrade a basic Linux shell.
commands.template: python3 -c 'import pty; pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'; export TERM=xterm; stty rows 40 columns 120

commands.title: Socat Listener
commands.description: Catch a fully interactive Linux shell.

commands.title: Socat Victim
commands.description: Connect back with an interactive Linux shell.

commands.title: NXC - Pass The Hash
commands.description: Execute a command using a user's NTLM hash.

commands.title: NXC - Local Admin Check
commands.description: Check where credentials have local admin rights.

commands.title: NXC - Command Exec
commands.description: Run a command through SMB with valid admin credentials.

commands.title: Secrets Dump
commands.description: Dumps secrets from the remote machine, including LSA secrets and SAM database.

commands.title: DCSync
commands.description: Ask a Domain Controller to replicate user credential data.

commands.title: GetADUsers
commands.description: List AD users and useful metadata.

commands.title: GetUserSPNs
commands.description: List Kerberoastable service accounts.

commands.title: BloodyAD - Set Password
commands.description: Change another user's password when your account has ResetPassword/GenericAll rights.

commands.title: BloodyAD - Enable User
commands.description: Reactivate a disabled domain user when your account can write account control flags.

commands.title: PowerView - Set Password
commands.description: Change a controlled user's password from PowerShell.

commands.title: PowerView - Enable User
commands.description: Enable a disabled user from PowerShell.

commands.title: Net RPC - Set Password
commands.description: Change an SMB domain user's password with valid delegated rights.

commands.title: Rpcclient - User Info
commands.description: Check target user flags before changing account state.

commands.title: BloodHound Ingestor (Python)
commands.description: Run this on a compromised machine to collect AD data.

commands.title: BloodHound Ingestor (Credentials)
commands.description: Run from your attack box with known credentials.

commands.title: BloodHound Ingestor (PTH)
commands.description: Run using Pass-the-Hash.

commands.title: ADCS Vulnerable Templates
commands.description: Check certificate services for vulnerable templates.

commands.title: Writable ACLs
commands.description: Find objects the current account can modify.

commands.title: Delegation Review
commands.description: Enumerate unconstrained, constrained, and resource-based delegation.

commands.title: GPP Passwords
commands.description: Check SYSVOL for legacy Group Policy Preferences passwords.

commands.title: LAPS Read
commands.description: Try reading LAPS passwords when delegated rights exist.

commands.title: MSSQL Check
commands.description: Check MSSQL access and server context.

commands.title: LinPEAS
commands.description: Run the LinPEAS script to automatically find privilege escalation vectors.

commands.title: Check Sudo
commands.description: Check what commands the current user can run as root.

commands.title: Writable Paths
commands.description: Find writable directories outside noisy virtual filesystems.

commands.title: Find SUID Binaries
commands.description: Find files with the SUID bit set, which may be exploitable.

commands.title: Find Capabilities
commands.description: Find binaries with special capabilities that can be abused.

commands.title: List Cron Jobs
commands.description: Check for scheduled tasks that might be misconfigured.

commands.title: Interesting Files
commands.description: Search for common secrets in readable files.

commands.title: Sudo Version
commands.description: Check sudo version when sudo rules look interesting.

commands.title: Writable Service Files
commands.description: Find writable systemd unit files.

commands.title: Writable PATH Hijack
commands.description: Check PATH directories that the current user can write to.
commands.template: echo $PATH | tr ':' '\n' | while read d; do [ -w "$d" ] && echo "$d"; done

commands.title: NFS Exports
commands.description: Check local NFS export configuration.

commands.title: pspy64
commands.description: Monitor processes to find cron jobs or other automated scripts.

commands.title: User Context
commands.description: Show current user, groups, and privileges.

commands.title: System Info
commands.description: Collect Windows version and patch context.

commands.title: Services
commands.description: List services with binary paths.

commands.title: AlwaysInstallElevated
commands.description: Check MSI install elevation policy.
commands.template: reg query HKCU\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer /v AlwaysInstallElevated & reg query HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer /v AlwaysInstallElevated

commands.title: Saved Credentials
commands.description: List saved Windows credentials.

commands.title: Unquoted Service Paths
commands.description: Find services with unquoted paths and spaces.
commands.template: wmic service get name,pathname,startmode | findstr /i "Auto" | findstr /i /v "C:\\Windows\\" | findstr /i /v '"'

commands.title: Writable Service Config
commands.description: Check whether a service can be reconfigured.

commands.title: Stored Registry Secrets
commands.description: Search common registry locations for stored credentials.
commands.template: reg query HKLM /f password /t REG_SZ /s 2>nul & reg query HKCU /f password /t REG_SZ /s 2>nul

commands.title: PowerUp
commands.description: Run common Windows privilege escalation checks.

commands.title: Chisel Server
commands.description: Start a reverse SOCKS server on the attacker box.

commands.title: Chisel Client
commands.description: Create a reverse SOCKS tunnel from the target.

commands.title: SSH Dynamic SOCKS
commands.description: Create a local SOCKS proxy over SSH.

commands.title: Proxychains Test
commands.description: Verify traffic through the configured proxy.

commands.title: My Tool Collection
commands.description: Just my own Tool Collection. Might update once in a while

commands.title: Reverse Shell Listener
commands.description: Sets up a listener to catch an incoming reverse shell.

commands.title: Bash Reverse Shell
commands.description: Execute on a Linux victim to send a shell back.

commands.title: Python HTTP Server
commands.description: A simple way to serve files from your current directory.

commands.title: Download File (Linux)
commands.description: Download a file from your attacker machine to the victim.

commands.title: Download File (Windows CMD)
commands.description: Download a file to a Windows victim via cmd.

commands.title: Download File (Windows PS)
commands.description: Download a file to a Windows victim via PowerShell.

commands.title: Upload from Victim (Attacker)
commands.description: Create a listener on the attacker machine.

commands.title: Upload from Victim (Victim)
commands.description: Upload data from the victim machine with netcat.

commands.title: Base64 Encode
commands.description: Encode a file for clipboard-safe transfer.

commands.title: Base64 Decode
commands.description: Decode a base64 blob back to a file.

commands.title: Search (Linux)
commands.description: Find text files under the current user's home.

commands.title: Search (Windows CMD)
commands.description: Find text files on Windows.

commands.title: Python PTY Size
commands.description: Set terminal rows and columns after shell upgrade.
